query: Bitcoin price and market conditions June 2026
answer:
# Bitcoin Price & Market Conditions — June 6, 2026

## Executive Summary

Bitcoin is trading at approximately **$61,000** as of June 6, 2026, in the midst of a severe market downturn. The price has fallen over 51% from its all-time high of $126,080 reached on October 6, 2025, and is currently sitting at its **365-day low**. The Crypto Fear & Greed Index reads **12 ("Extreme Fear")**, one of the lowest possible readings, reflecting deep market pessimism.

---

## 1. Current Price

| Source | Price (USD) |
|---|---|
| CoinGecko | **$61,011** |
| CoinPaprika | **$61,030** |

Both major data aggregators confirm Bitcoin is trading around **$61,000**.

## 2. Market Capitalization

| Source | Market Cap |
|---|---|
| CoinGecko | **$1.224 trillion** |
| CoinPaprika | **$1.223 trillion** |

- **Circulating Supply:** 20,039,087 BTC (out of 21M max)
- **BTC Dominance:** ~56.2% (CoinGecko) / ~55.7% (CoinPaprika)

## 3. Trading Volume (24h)

| Source | 24h Volume |
|---|---|
| CoinGecko | **$66.2 billion** |
| CoinPaprika | **$63.2 billion** |

Volume is elevated, consistent with a significant selloff period and heightened trading activity.

## 4. Recent Price Performance

| Period | Change |
|---|---|
| 24 hours | **-1.45%** |
| 7 days | **-16.99%** |
| 14 days | **-18.25%** |
| 30 days | **-24.55%** |
| 60 days | **-10.58%** |
| 200 days | **-33.19%** |
| 1 year | **-41.16%** |
| YTD (from $87,520) | **-30.30%** |

### Daily Price Trajectory (Last 7 Days)
| Date | Price |
|---|---|
| June 1 | $73,593 |
| June 2 | $71,360 |
| June 3 | $66,650 |
| June 4 | $64,022 |
| June 5 | $63,796 |
| June 6 | ~$61,000 |

### Key Price Levels
- **All-Time High:** $126,080 (Oct 6, 2025) — currently **-51.6%** from ATH
- **365-Day Low:** ~$60,922 (today, June 6, 2026)
- **30-Day High:** $82,146

## 5. Market Sentiment

The **Crypto Fear & Greed Index** has been at **12 ("Extreme Fear")** for 4 consecutive days (June 3–6), plunging from "Fear" (28–29) in late May. This is among the lowest readings possible and indicates extreme pessimism and potential capitulation.

## 6. Broader Crypto Market Context

| Metric | Value |
|---|---|
| Total Crypto Market Cap | ~$2.18 trillion |
| Crypto Market ATH | $4.82 trillion (Oct 5, 2025) |
| Decline from Market ATH | ~55% |
| Total 24h Volume | ~$159 billion |
| Ethereum Dominance | 8.70% |
| ETH 24h Change | -5.51% |

Bitcoin dominance at ~56% indicates BTC is holding relatively better than altcoins during this downturn, with capital rotating toward the more liquid asset.

## 7. Key Takeaways

- Bitcoin is at a **365-day low** and has experienced an **accelerating selloff** — losing ~17% in one week and ~25% in one month.
- The decline from the October 2025 ATH of $126,080 now exceeds **50%**, a classic bear market threshold.
- **Extreme Fear** sentiment (index at 12/100) persists for four consecutive days.
- Altcoins are underperforming Bitcoin, with ETH down 5.5% in 24 hours vs. BTC's 1.5%.
- The 90-day trajectory shows a rally from ~$66K in March to $82K in mid-May, followed by a sharp reversal and collapse in early June.

---

*Data sourced from CoinGecko API, CoinPaprika API, and Alternative.me Fear & Greed Index. All data retrieved live at approximately 12:59 UTC on June 6, 2026.*
